sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23213" key="daih=sai" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαιῆσαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διδάξαι,</foreign> Id.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Άω.</foreign> </entryFree>
